questions.question: The elements in which the last electron enters the f-orbital are called:
questions.explanation: Elements where the 4f and 5f orbitals are being filled are called f-block elements or inner-transition elements.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: Which of the following properties generally decreases across a period from left to right?
questions.explanation: Atomic radius generally decreases across a period due to increase in effective nuclear charge, which pulls the electrons closer.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: Which element has the highest negative electron gain enthalpy?
questions.explanation: Chlorine has a higher negative electron gain enthalpy than fluorine because the small size of fluorine leads to strong inter-electronic repulsions.
questions.subject: Chemistry
